title: Sunbridge
subtitle: Homefinder Map Refresh (2025)
overview: In early 2025, I led the complete refresh of the interactive Sunbridge Homefinder map, modernizing a longstanding community map to showcase evolving neighborhoods and amenities.
resultHighlight: Live interactive map refresh with stronger amenity detail and clearer navigation.

title: Lakewood Ranch
subtitle: Community & Selector Map Experiences
overview: I led GIS data management, base map development, and interactive storytelling experiences for the Lakewood Ranch Community and Selector maps across one of the largest master-planned communities in the United States.
resultHighlight: Scrollytelling and custom mapping for a 32,000-acre community experience.

title: US Spaceflight History
subtitle: 30 Day Map Challenge - 8-Bit Space Launch Visualization
overview: An interactive retro-styled visualization of 65 years of United States spaceflight history, with each launch rendered as a 3D arch soaring from the planet surface.

title: Rush Hour Traffic Simulation
subtitle: 30 Day Map Challenge - Real-Time Vehicle Simulation
overview: A real-time traffic simulation where every vehicle makes independent decisions each second - monitoring spacing, responding to traffic signals, and adjusting acceleration and braking.

title: Multifamily Community Layers
subtitle: 30 Day Map Challenge - Multi-Zoom Visualization
overview: A layered visualization of a multifamily residential community that reveals increasing detail at each zoom level - from parking lots down to individual unit availability.

title: Global Tectonic Structure
subtitle: 30 Day Map Challenge - Lava-Style Visualization
overview: A cinematic lava-style thematic map layering global microplates, major fault zones, and plate interfaces over shaded relief.
